Off Calendar Sep-26-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Carlos E. Sosa, Esq., LAW OFFICFS OF HAUSMAN & SOSA, LLP, (818) 654-9000, csosa&ahausmansosa.com, for Cross-Defendant and Cross-Complainant WESTERN SURETY COMPANY
Dana Sack, Esq., SACK ROSENDIN, LLP, 510-286-2200, ds@sackrosendin.com, for Cross-Defendants
Liberty Development Group, LLC

Hearing is held. Not Argued. Counsel, Carlos E. Sosa seeks clarification of the tentative ruling and proposed order. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT WESTERN SURETY COMPANY unopposed motion "for an order of deposit, restraining order, interpleader and attorney's fees" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
